<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Attribute; /** * Service tag to autoconfigure targeted value resolvers. */ #[\Attribute(\Attribute::TARGET_CLASS)] class AsTargetedValueResolver { /** * @param string|null $name The name with which the resolver can be targeted */ public function __construct(public readonly ?string $name = null) { } }
